title.ko: 관련된 요소 매체의 광학적 특성을 수정하여 빛을 제어하기 위한 광학 장치 또는 배열; 비선형 광학; 광의 주파수 변화; 광학 논리 요소; 광학 아날로그/디지털 컨버터
title.en: OPTICAL DEVICES OR ARRANGEMENTS FOR THE CONTROL OF LIGHT BY MODIFICATION OF THE OPTICAL PROPERTIES OF THE MEDIA OF THE ELEMENTS INVOLVED THEREIN; NON-LINEAR OPTICS; FREQUENCY-CHANGING OF LIGHT; OPTICAL LOGIC ELEMENTS; OPTICAL ANALOGUE/DIGITAL CONVERTERS

title.ko: 독립된 광원으로부터 도달한 광의 강도, 색, 위상, 편광 또는 방향의 제어를 위한 장치 또는 배치, 예. 스위칭, 게이팅 또는 변조; 비선형 광학
title.en: Devices or arrangements for the control of the intensity, colour, phase, polarisation or direction of light arriving from an independent light source, e.g. switching, gating or modulating; Non-linear optics

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 이하의 것만을 포함한다. - 물리적 파라미터, 예. 전장, 전류, 자장,소리 또는 기계적 진동, 응력 또는 열적효과, 의 영향 또는 제어에 의한 장치 또는 배치, 예. 셀, 의 매체의 광학적 성질의 변화에 의한 광학적 작용이 변화하는 장치 또는 배치; - 광빔의 전장 또는 자장성분이 매체의 광학적 성질에 영향을 끼치는 장치 또는 배치, 즉 비선형 광학; - 전자파(전자파), 예. 무선파, 또는 전자 혹은 기타 소립자에 의한 광의 제어

title.ko: 강도, 위상, 편광 또는 색의 제어를 위한 것(G02F 1/29, G02F 1/35가 우선)
title.en: for the control of the intensity, phase, polarisation or colour (G02F0001290000, G02F0001350000 take precedence)

title.ko: 적어도 하나의 전위장벽을 갖는 반도체 소자에 기초한 것, 예. PN, PIN 접합(G02F1/03이 우선)
title.en: based on semiconductor elements having potential barriers, e.g. having a PN or PIN junction  (G02F0001030000 takes precedence)
Structures with periodic or quasi periodic potential variation, e.g. superlattices, quantum wells

title.ko: 광도파로 구조의 것(G02F 1/017이 우선)
title.en: in an optical waveguide structure (G02F0001017000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 세라믹 또는 전기광학적 결정에 기초한 것, 예. 포켈효과(Pockels effect) 또는 커어효과(Kerr effect)를 나타내는 것(G02F 1/061이 우선)
title.en: based on ceramics or electro-optical crystals, e.g. exhibiting Pockels or Kerr effect (G02F0001061000 takes precedence)
in an optical waveguide structure

title.ko: 강유전적 성질을 갖는 것(G02F 1/035, G02F 1/055가 우선)
title.en: with ferro-electric properties (G02F0001035000, G02F0001055000 take precedence)

title.ko: 능동물질이 세라믹인 것(G02F 1/035가 우선)
title.en: the active material being a ceramic (G02F0001035000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 전기광학적 유기물질에 기초한 것(G02F 1/07이 우선)
title.en: based on electro-optical organic material (G02F0001070000 takes precedence)
in an optical waveguide structure
based on electro-optical liquids exhibiting Kerr effect
based on magneto-optical elements, e.g. exhibiting Faraday effect
in an optical waveguide structure

title.ko: 음향광학소자에 기초한 것, 예. 음파 또는 그와 유사한 기계적인 파에 의한 가변회절을 이용하는 것(음향광학적 편향 G02F 1/33)
title.en: based on acousto-optical elements, e.g. using variable diffraction by sound or like mechanical waves (acousto-optical deflection G02F0001330000)
in an optical waveguide structure

title.ko: 액정에 기초한 것, 예. 하나의 액정 표시 셀
title.en: based on liquid crystals, e.g. single liquid crystal display cells

title.ko: 구조배치 ; 액정셀의 작동 ; 회로배치(매트릭스 형태에서 액정소자의 제어를 위한 배치 또는 회로, 이들 소자에 구조적으로 결합되지 않은 것 G09G 3/36)
title.en: Constructional arrangements; Operation of liquid crystal cells; Circuit arrangements (arrangements or circuits for control of liquid crystal elements in a matrix, not structurally associated with these elements G09G0003360000)
Constructional arrangements (G02F0001135000, G02F0001136000 take precedence)
based on polymer-dispersed liquid crystals, e.g. microencapsulated liquid crystals
Structural association of cells with optical devices, e.g. polarisers or reflectors
Illuminating devices
Birefringent elements, e.g. for optical compensation
Surface-induced orientation of the liquid crystal molecules, e.g. by alignment layers
Gaskets; Spacers; Sealing of cells
Filling or closing of cells
Electrodes
Conductors connecting electrodes to cell terminals
Arrangement of liquid crystal layers or cells in which the final condition of one light beam is achieved by the addition of the effects of two or more layers or cells
Liquid crystal cells structurally associated with a photoconducting or a ferro-electric layer, the properties of which can be optically or electrically varied

title.ko: 반도체층 또는 기판과 구조적으로 결합된 액정셀, 예. 집적회로의 일부를 구성하는 셀(G02F1/135가 우선)
title.en: Liquid crystal cells structurally associated with a semi-conducting layer or substrate, e.g. cells forming part of an integrated circuit (G02F0001135000 takes precedence)
Active matrix addressed cells
in which the switching element is a two-electrode device
in which the switching element is a three-electrode device
characterised by the electro-optical or magneto-optical effect, e.g. field-induced phase transition, orientation effect, guest-host interaction or dynamic scattering
based on orientation effects in which the liquid crystal remains transparent
using ferroelectric liquid crystals
based on an electrochromic effect
caused by oxidation-reduction reactions in organic liquid solutions, e.g. viologen solutions
based on electrodeposition, e.g. electrolytic deposition of an inorganic material on or close to an electrode
characterised by the electrochromic material, e.g. by the electrodeposited material
comprising organic material
comprising inorganic material
Transition metal compounds
Constructional details
Electrodes
Structural association of cells with optical devices, e.g. reflectors or illuminating devices
Gaskets; Spacers; Sealing of cells; Filling or closing of cells
Operation of electrochromic cells, e.g. electrodeposition cells; Circuit arrangements therefor
based on translational movement of particles in a fluid under the influence of an applied field
characterised by the electro-optical or magneto-optical effect
by electrophoresis
involving dry toners
by magnetophoresis
Constructional details
Structures for supporting or mounting cells, e.g. frames or bezels
Substrates
Insulating layers
Microcapsules
Electrodes
Side-by-side arrangement of working electrodes and counter-electrodes
having three or more electrodes per pixel
for active matrices
Structural association of cells with optical devices, e.g. reflectors or illuminating devices
Gaskets; Spacers; Sealing of cells; Filling or closing of cells
having two or more microcells partitioned by walls, e.g. of microcup type
Operation of cells; Circuit arrangements affecting the entire cell
based on orientable non-spherical particles having a common optical characteristic, e.g. suspended particles of reflective metal flakes

title.ko: G02F 1/015 ～ G02F 1/16 에 포함되지 않는 가변흡수 요소에 기반한 것
title.en: based on variable-absorption elements not provided for in groups G02F0001015000-G02F0001169000

title.ko: G02F 1/015 ～ G02F 1/169 에 포함되지 않는 가변-반사 또는 가변-굴절 요소에 기반한 것
title.en: based on variable-reflection or variable-refraction elements not provided for in groups G02F0001015000-G02F0001169000
by interference
in an optical waveguide structure

title.ko: 색의 제어를 위한 것(G02F 1/03 ～ G02F 1/21이 우선)
title.en: for the control of the colour (G02F0001030000-G02F0001210000 take precedence)
as to hue or predominant wavelength

title.ko: 광빔의 위치 또는 방향의 제어를 위한 것, 즉 편향
title.en: for the control of the position or the direction of light beams, i.e. deflection

title.ko: 광도파로 구조의 것(G02F 1/313,G02F 1/335가 우선)
title.en: in an optical waveguide structure (G02F0001313000, G02F0001335000 take precedence)

title.ko: 디지털 편향장치(G02F 1/33이 우선)
title.en: Digital deflection devices (G02F0001330000 takes precedence)
in an optical waveguide structure
based on the use of controlled total internal reflection
Acousto-optical deflection devices
having an optical waveguide structure

title.ko: 비선형광학
title.en: Non-linear optics
characterised by the materials used
Organic materials

title.ko: 광도파로 구조의 것(G02F1/377이 우선)
title.en: in an optical waveguide structure (G02F0001377000 takes precedence)
for second-harmonic generation
in an optical waveguide structure
of the optical fibre type

title.ko: 광, 적외, 또는 자외파의 파라메트릭 발진 또는 증폭을 위한 것
title.en: for parametric generation or amplification of light, infrared, or ultraviolet waves

title.ko: 광의 복조; 변조광의 변조전이; 광의 주파수변환(G02F 1/35가 우선)
title.en: Demodulating light; Transferring the modulation of modulated light; Frequency-changing of light (G02F0001350000 takes precedence)
Frequency-changing of light, e.g. by quantum counters
Optical logic elements; Optical bistable devices
Optical bistable devices
Optical analogue/digital converters
